meta.title: HearMe — A safe space to talk, reflect, and feel heard
meta.description: HearMe is a voice-first AI conversation companion. Talk freely in your language, reflect, and get meaningful insights, summaries, and mood reports. Not therapy — a space to feel heard.

hero.title: A safe space to talk, reflect, and feel heard.
hero.subtitle: Talk freely in your language. HearMe listens, reflects with you, and turns your conversations into insights, summaries, and mood reports.
hero.disclaimer: HearMe is a reflection and support companion — not a therapist and not a medical service.

voice.title: Just talk
voice.body: Push to talk in your own language and pace. No typing, no judgement.

memory.title: Remembers what matters
memory.body: Recalls your goals and recurring themes across conversations.

reports.title: Meaningful reports
reports.body: Each conversation becomes a summary with mood and reflection prompts.

private.title: Private by design
private.body: Your conversations are yours. Control your data and retention.

q1.q: Is HearMe a replacement for therapy?
q1.a: No. HearMe is a reflection and emotional-support companion. It does not diagnose or treat any condition. If you are in crisis, please contact a local helpline.

q2.a: English, Hindi, Hinglish, German, Spanish, French, Arabic, Portuguese, and Japanese — with more added over time.
